geographic_restrictions: Local and state measures in New York, Washington, and California (specific cities/regions: New York City, Bellingham, Ferndale, Santa Cruz)
project_area: Affordable housing production, renter protections, homelessness solutions, and tenant rights
demographic_requirements: Low-income renters (as part of the Our Homes, Our Votes campaign focus)
eligibility_summary: Ballot measures approved by voters in local and state elections to accelerate affordable housing, expand tenant rights, and fund homelessness solutions. Organizers and advocates working on housing justice initiatives are encouraged to engage with NLIHC's Our Homes, Our Votes campaign for resources and support.
